# GoalOS Care Command v66

GoalOS Care Command is the front-and-center public-safe command experience for GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension.

The visitor writes one plain-language objective. The console locally prepares:

- Mission Contract
- Evidence Docket plan
- Verifier Mesh
- Governed Decision State
- recommended route
- alternative routes
- Ask GoalOS local chat handoff
- downloadable `GoalOSCareCommandReceipt`

## User promise

Plain language is enough. The user does not need to know whether they need an Evidence Docket, Until-DONE state machine, RSI console, settlement lifecycle, or legal boundary page before starting.

## Public-safe boundary

No account. No form submission. No wallet. No token approval. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No network request from the console. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data retained.

## What this does not claim

The console does not provide legal, financial, tax, security, audit, factual-certification, Mainnet, or production authority. It is a browser-local guide and proof-path composer.
